title: Almond Bliss Sweet Treat
description: A quick and easy sweet treat featuring flaked almonds, perfect for a snack or dessert, suitable for those following a sugar-free diet.

ingredients.name: maple syrup (or another sugar-free sweetener of choice)

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the almond flour, maple syrup, vanilla extract, baking powder, and salt.
Add in the melted butter and almond extract. Stir until well combined.
Fold in freshly grated nutmeg for an extra touch of flavor.
Pour the mixture into a greased 8-inch square pan.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top and a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow it to cool slightly before slicing.
